<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Metaalhond (astrologie)]][[cdo:Gĕng-sáe̤k]][[de:Metall-Hund]][[hak:Kâng-sut]][[ja:庚戌]][[ko:경술]][[vi:Canh Tuất]][[za:Gengswt]][[zh-min-nan:Keng-sut]][[zh-yue:庚戌]][[zh:庚戌]]
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Metaalhond (astrologie)]][[cdo:Gĕng-sáe̤k]][[de:Metall-Hund]][[hak:Kâng-sut]][[ja:庚戌]][[ko:경술]][[vi:Canh Tuất]][[za:Gengswt]][[zh-min-nan:Keng-sut]][[zh-yue:庚戌]][[zh:庚戌]]
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Metaalhond (astrologie)]][[cdo:Gĕng-sáe̤k]][[de:Metall-Hund]][[hak:Kâng-sut]][[ja:庚戌]][[ko:경술]][[vi:Canh Tuất]][[za:Gengswt]][[zh-min-nan:Keng-sut]][[zh-yue:庚戌]][[zh:庚戌]]

{{infobox Chinese|l=Yang Metal Dog|kanji=庚戌|romaji=kanoe inu|onyomi=kōjutsu|p=gēngxū|w=keng-hsü|mi=kɤŋ⁵³ ɕy|y=geng1 seot1|j=geng1 seot1|ci=kɪŋ sœt̚|mc=kæŋ syt|oc-bs=kˤraŋ ʔsuʔ|qq=}}
{{Sexagenary cycle|qq=}}

'''Yang Metal Dog also known as 庚戌''' (kanoe inu (庚戌), koukin no inu (庚戌), koujutsu (庚戌)) is one of the elements of the [[Sexagenary cycle]].

It is the 47th combination of the [[Sexagenary cycle]], preceded by [[Yin Earth Rooster|Kiyuu]] and followed by [[Yin Metal Pig|Shingai]]. In the framework of [[Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|Yin Yang Five Elements]], the [[Heavenly Stems]] symbol [[Kanoe (庚)]] represents yang [[Metal (wuxing)|Metal (金)]], while the [[Earthly Branches]] symbol [[Dog (zodiac)|Dog (戌)]] represents yang [[Earth (wuxing)|Earth (土)]], establishing a generating relationship ([[Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)|Mutual Generation]]) (Earth generates Metal).

==Pronunciation==
* English: Yang Metal Dog (庚戌)
** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): gēngxū
** Cantonese (Jyutping): gaang1 seot1
**  Japanese:
***Kunyomi 1: Kanoe-inu
***Kunyomi 2: koukin-no-inu
***Onyomi 1: koushu
** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): gyeongsul (경술)
** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Canh Tuất

<!--
==
* Yang Metal Dog (庚戌) 
** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): gēngxū
** Cantonese (Jyutping): gang1 zeoi3
**  Japanese:
***Kunyomi: かのえいぬ (kanoe-inu)
***Onyomi: こうかのいぬ (kōka-no-inu)
***Onyomi: こうじゅつ (kōjutsu)
** Korean (Revised Romanization): gyeongsuk
** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Canh Tuất

-->
==Years of Yang Metal Dog==
A year in the [[Common Era]] that leaves a remainder of 50 when divided by 60 is a [[Year|year]] of [[Yang Metal Dog]].
{| class="wikitable"
|+'''Yang Metal Dog (庚戌)'s years table'''
|-
! [[1st millennium|1st Millennium]] !! [[2nd millennium|2nd Millennium]] !! [[3rd millennium|3rd Millennium]]
|-
|
* [[AD 50|50 AD]]
* [[AD 110|110 AD]]* [[170|170 AD]]
* [[230|230 AD]]
* [[290|290 AD]]
* [[350|350 AD]]
* [[410|410 AD]]
* [[470|470 AD]]
* [[530|530 AD]]
* [[590|590 AD]]
* [[650|650 AD]]
* [[710|710 AD]]
* [[770|770 AD]]
* [[830|830 AD]]
* [[890|890 AD]]
* [[950|950 AD]]
|
* [[1010|1010 AD]]
* [[1070|1070 AD]]
* [[1130|1130 AD]]
* [[1190|1190 AD]]
* [[1250|1250 AD]]
* [[1310|1310 AD]]
* [[1370|1370 AD]]
* [[1430|1430 AD]]
* [[1490|1490 AD]]
* [[1550|1550 AD]]
* [[1610|1610 AD]]
* [[1670|1670 AD]]
* [[1730|1730 AD]]
* [[1790|1790 AD]]
* [[1850|1850 AD]]
* [[1910|1910 AD]]
* [[1970|1970 AD]]
|
* [[2030|2030 AD]]
* [[2090 AD]]
* [[22nd century|2150 AD]]
* [[23rd century|2210 AD]]
* [[23rd century|2270 AD]]
* [[2330 AD]]
* [[24th century|2390 AD]]
* [[2450 AD]]
* [[2510 AD]]
* [[2570 AD]]
* [[2630 AD]]
* [[2690 AD]]
* [[2750 AD]]
* [[2810 AD]]
* [[2870 AD]]
* [[2930 AD]]
* [[2990 AD]]
|}

==Months of Yang Metal Dog==
In a [[Common Era]] year whose final digit is 2 or 7 (when the [[Heavenly Stems]] are [[Mizunoe (壬)]] or [[Hinoto (丁)]]), the month of [[September]] is designated as the [[Month|month (calendar)]] of [[Yang Metal Dog]]. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the [[Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]] or to the seasonal month (from [[Hanlu|Cold Dew]] until the day before [[Lidong|Beginning of Winter]]) as applicable.

==Days of Yang Metal Dog==
=== Selected Day (選日) ===
None.
==See Also==
*{{prefix|qq=}}
*{{intitle|qq=}}

[[zh-min-nan:Kap-chú]]
[[zh-yue:甲寅]]

{{translated page|ja|qq=Yang Metal Dog|qq=ja|庚戌|version=98658343|comment=Imported full ja history}}



[[cdo:Gák-cṳ̄de]]
[[nds:Erd-Tigeri]]
[[de:Yang Metal Dog]]

[[ja:庚戌]]

[[zh:庚戌]]
[[ko:경술]]
[[fr:Chien de métal]]
[[de:Metall-Hund]]

[[af:Aardetier (astrologie)]]
[[de:Erde-Tigreen]]
[[en:Earth Tiger]]
[[fr:Tigre de terreboishak]]
[[it:Kap-chṳ́id]]

[[ko:갑인]]
[[vi:Giáp Dần]]
[[za:Gyapceij]]
[[zh:甲寅]]
[[ar:Yang Metal Dog]]

<!--Yang Metal Dog--><!--Yang Metal Dog-->

<!--jawiki derived wikidata interwikis-->
[[af:Metaalhond (astrologie)]]
[[cdo:Gĕng-sáe̤k]]
[[hak:Kâng-sut]]
[[vi:Canh Tuất]]
[[za:Gengswt]]
[[zh-min-nan:Keng-sut]]
[[zh-yue:庚戌]]
<!--zhwiki derived wikidata interwikis-->
[[af:Metaalhond (astrologie)]]
[[cdo:Gĕng-sáe̤k]]
[[hak:Kâng-sut]]
[[vi:Canh Tuất]]
[[za:Gengswt]]
[[zh-min-nan:Keng-sut]]
[[zh-yue:庚戌]]
{{wikidata link|Q904484}}
[[Category:Sexagenary cycle]]
[[Category:Sexagenary cycle members]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
[[Category:translated pages with valid en interwikis]]
[[Category:Wikidata has short description]]
[[Category:WikiProject Japanese Calendar]]
